summary:
GEOGRAPHICAL READ
India colocation (Colo) dominates with 281 signals, followed by Build (18) and Power (9) — concentrated in Maharashtra (NTT India, Reliance, Tata Communications), Delhi (Nxtra Data, Oracle India), Tamil Nadu (Sify Technologies), Telangana (Yotta Technologies), Karnataka (Google India), and Gujarat (AdaniConnex). GCC activity shows UAE leading in Colo (11) and Build (8), Saudi Arabia strongest in regulation (15 items), while Kuwait and Oman show minimal Colo presence. Whitespace targets active in GCC with no India entity: center3 (GCC; SA), Khazna (GCC; UAE), Gulf Data Hub (UAE), Ooredoo (GCC).

POLICY READ
India regulation shows three notices of attachment of bank and demat accounts (AP Nos. 15504–15509 of 2026) — potential financial compliance risks for data-center operators. Saudi Arabia regulation drives 15 items including cloud growth, AI innovation, Hajj/UMRAH data-center shifts, and construction market insights — indicating regional expansion pressure that may push GCC players toward India for diversification or policy arbitrage. No India legislation or analysis signals detected.

COMMERCIAL READ
India Colo layer leads with 264 signals — top operators: Sify Technologies Limited (29 job postings), National Internet Exchange of India (23), Ishan Netsol Pvt Ltd (19), CtrlS Datacenters Ltd (18), Nxtra Data Ltd (14). UAE leads GCC Colo (7) and Build (0), Saudi Arabia shows Power layer activity (1 each in Power and Build). No India activity in Compute, Cooling, Network, or Power layers per commercial heatmap — all India signals are in Colo and Build.

RANKED INDIA OPPORTUNITIES
1. center3 — why-now: active in GCC (SA) with no India entity (whitespace target), recent news 2026-04-05; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: 0223d872de10, 79fd79d26e0a, c91f9bae49fe, b8ff3f8e9923, 6ea4c9dde3eb, 94c55c554538, 466ef9dd1e65, 8eaa1b1ce927
2. Khazna — why-now: active in GCC (UAE) with no India entity (whitespace target), score 32.6; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: not in data (whitespace only lists name/score/geo)
3. Gulf Data Hub — why-now: active in GCC (UAE) with no India entity (whitespace target), score 28.5; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: not in data
4. Ooredoo — why-now: active in GCC with no India entity (whitespace target), score 25.4; TAG play: India market-entry; evidence: not in data
5. CtrlS — why-now: India entity (U74999MH2006PLC218261) with recent news 2026-04-06 and unresolved Watch play; TAG play: India government-affairs (monitoring regulatory notices) / partnership needs); evidence: 8031780bae1e, 2d2e44f68cdd, 5c16e38b7910, 86c9cfef3386, 439f740d3a33, 3177f4f8489b, 39471e6ed1fb, a81184f81bc4
6. 7. Sify — why-now: India entity (U72200TN1995PLC050809) with 1 new signal ≤7d and top momentum (9.29); TAG play: India partnership (leveraging filing activity and job-posting lead); evidence: 341f0dc0b422, 0001554855-26-001437, 0001554855-26-000600, 0001575872-26-000022, 0001575872-25-000666, 0001575872-25-000646, 49dd2464fa3e, 594d534e0c59

NTT — why-now: India entity (U72200MH1994PTC083713) with 1 new signal ≤7d and active Watch play; TAG play: India government-affairs (monitoring Power-layer exposure and regulatory notices); evidence: 5c227cb1dab9, f93b00d1a096, 9bebeffb80d4, 7f601dd7d918, b0d383910b8f, d598f492192e, e695b0f92a4c, a73a50b20f5c
